name: Lorem Ipsum Statistics Workflow
description: Generate a 5-paragraph lorem ipsum file, read it, count words and sentences, and display statistics

tasks.name: Generate and save lorem ipsum
tasks.description: You MUST call python_exec to generate exactly 5 paragraphs of lorem ipsum text. Use the standard Lorem library or generate placeholder text. Then you MUST call file_write to save the generated text to a file named 'lorem_ipsum.txt'. Output the complete generated text verbatim so downstream tasks can verify the content.
tasks.success_criteria: Output contains the full generated lorem ipsum text and confirms the file was written to lorem_ipsum.txt

tasks.name: Read the lorem ipsum file
tasks.description: You MUST call file_read to read the contents of 'lorem_ipsum.txt' that was created in task_001. Output the FULL file contents verbatim. Do NOT summarize as 'file was read' — downstream tasks need the actual text to count words and sentences.
tasks.success_criteria: Output contains the complete file contents from lorem_ipsum.txt with all 5 paragraphs visible

tasks.name: Count words and sentences and display statistics
tasks.description: You MUST call python_exec to count the total number of words and sentences from the file content provided by task_002. Use Python string operations to: (1) count words by splitting on whitespace, (2) count sentences by splitting on '.', '!', and '?'. Then output the statistics in a clear format like 'Total Words: X, Total Sentences: Y'. The output MUST include both specific numbers.
tasks.success_criteria: Output contains specific numeric counts in format 'Total Words: X, Total Sentences: Y' where X and Y are positive integers

metadata.goal: Create lorem ipsum file and calculate word/sentence statistics
